value.found_quote: In AntiGravity user settings i have enabled everywhere, where its possible that the model auto proceeds. My deny list is also empty. My problem is, it still asks for input on my side.
value.rationale: The page is a Google AI Developers Forum thread about Google Antigravity. It describes user settings/policy controls that govern whether the model auto-proceeds, including a deny list, "Always run" / "Always Proceed" permissions, and browser and tmp permissions — i.e., guardrail-style controls within Antigravity. This substantiates that Google Antigravity has guardrail/policy settings, even though the thread is reporting a bug where they don't apply as expected. The offering itself is presented as currently in use (active).
